name: scholar-evaluation
tagline: Applies the ScholarEval framework to grade research papers, proposals, and literature reviews across 8 dimensions with scores and.
verdict: Security is clean: no exfiltration, destructive ops, obfuscation, or reviewer-manipulation patterns. Quality is uneven — the description never states trigger phrasing or exclusions, output format is left as 4 undifferentiated options with no default, and script/API failures (schematic generation, score calculator) are never addressed. A default.

highlights.summary: Line 37: schematics 'should be generated by default' via another skill/AI image tool — not mentioned anywhere in the description.
Description states capabilities and dimensions but never phrases a situational trigger ('use when...').
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill text anywhere in description or body.
